results.name: Fannie Mae
results.methodology_flag: F500 Gen-2 uniform 3.5x8 artifact at rank 32 (part of 36-45 cluster)
results.key_finding: 700 mass firings with ~200 predominantly Indian-American/Telugu employees over employer-approved Matching Gift donations; Congressional inquiry (Subramanyam + Krishnamoorthi + Thanedar); Westfall Act immunity defense = AB5/I4 anchor 1

results.name: TIAA
results.methodology_flag: F500 Gen-2 uniform 4.5x8 = 97.5 artifact AT RANK 1 — most visible single Gen-2 artifact in F500 index; forensic anchor case
results.key_finding: 2021 $97M SEC + NY AG settlement for misleading statements + active AARP-Foundation-backed ERISA class action (186% benchmark underperformance of proprietary in-house fund since 2009) + 15-year whistleblower pattern. Largest composite delta ever produced by Gen-2 audit: -38.9. Mission genuinely long-horizon (SYS 68.8); execution record is not exemplary.

results.name: Masimo Corporation
results.methodology_flag: F500 Gen-2 cluster 4x7+3.5x1 = 81.4 (ranks 10-17, 8 affected entities); second forensic anchor
results.key_finding: Dual DOJ (Feb 2024) + SEC (March 2024) subpoenas + 16-employee whistleblower suit + CEO Kiani undisclosed 75% stock pledge as personal-loan collateral + Politan proxy-contest corrective disclosures. Core SET pulse-oximetry technology genuinely clinical; governance record disqualifies exemplary band.

results.name: DeepMind/Google
results.methodology_flag: ai-labs 4x7+3.5x1=81.4 profile matches F500 Masimo cluster exactly — cross-index Gen-2 suspicion
results.key_finding: 60 UK cross-party MPs formally accuse Google of breaking Seoul Frontier AI Safety Commitments (Gemini 2.5 Pro released without safety report for 30+ days). AlphaFold and FSF genuinely exemplary (hold SYS 75.0); release-then-report pattern + Project Maven reversal + historical algorithmic-harm non-reparation collectively support established band.

results.name: Singapore
results.key_finding: UN High Commissioner Türk April 22 formal moratorium call on drug-related executions (8 YTD 2026); HRW April 15 call re: imminent cannabis-trafficking execution. ACT/SYS genuinely exemplary; drug-policy values-alignment is specific anchor holding Singapore out of higher band.

results.name: Germany
results.methodology_flag: Countries-index top-rank uniform-score cluster 4.5x7+4x1=95.9 (comparable to Norway ceiling artifact 2026-04-22)
results.key_finding: 40% 2024 hate-crime uptick + 50% right-wing extremist; coalition migration-policy regression; AfD designation as positive AB2; Holocaust memorial culture holds EQ5 strong. Delta partially ceiling-artifact.

results.name: Netherlands
results.methodology_flag: Countries-index top-rank uniform-score cluster (same cluster as Germany)
results.key_finding: Senate rejection of Emergency Asylum Act April 21 = BND positive; two-status asylum + Ter Apel conditions + NGO funding cuts = EQU regression. Urgenda and Toeslagenaffaire precedents genuinely exemplary ACC.

results.name: OpenAI
results.urgent_flag: Brockman 2017 diary 'it was a lie' cited by judge in Jan 15 2026 summary judgment denial; Musk v. Altman trial April 27 (4 days); SB 3444 deadline today
results.key_finding: INT dropped 25.0 → 17.5 on Tier-5 founder-contemporaneous evidence (Brockman diary); ACC dropped 22.5 → 20.0 on AB1 deterioration. Full reassessment post-trial-start April 27.

results.name: Palantir AI
results.key_finding: 22-point corporate manifesto April 20-21 operates as self-declared I1-I4 anchor 1 evidence (values-divergence publicly stated, not revealed by audit). Cultural-hierarchy language + AI-weapons normalization + compulsory-service advocacy produce further drops in EMP/EQU/BND/SYS/INT.

results.name: Anthropic
results.urgent_flag: DAY-OF-VOTE: SB 3261 committee vote IS today. Composite held at 61.6 — 1.6pts above established/functional boundary. Post-vote reassessment next cycle regardless of outcome.
results.key_finding: Hold 2026-04-22 score. No new evidence today (other than pre-vote position restatements, which do not shift scores). Prior change proposal (2026-04-22) remains the active one; today confirms.

results.name: Meta AI
results.key_finding: 2026-04-22 assessment remains current. $375M New Mexico child-exploitation verdict + keylogger rollout + Senate investigation cluster unchanged. No new material in past 24h.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor maintained. Apple App Store removal threat + CSAM class-action + 37-AG response + Paris prosecutor summons no-show pattern. No new material today.

results.name: United States
results.urgent_flag: DEI EO federal-contractor clause effective April 25
results.key_finding: 2026-04-22 assessment remains current. DEI EO + Westfall Act immunity precedent + ICE detention record unchanged.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Flotilla intercept context pending; 2026-04-22 assessment remains current. UN damage report April 20 + Global Sumud Flotilla departure April 12 + 37-INGO deregistration already scored.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: UNMISS mandate renewal vote not yet scheduled for this week per Security Council Report forecast; mandate extends through April 30 2026 per Resolution 2779 (2025). Re-queue after renewal vote. 2026-04-19 baseline holds.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: April 10 2026 SAC-M/ANFREL joint report formally documents 2025-26 sham elections; UN Special Rapporteur January statement; atrocities at 5-year high. Critical floor confirmed.

results.name: Interpublic Group
results.key_finding: Omnicom-IPG acquisition completed November 26 2025 per Omnicom press release. IPG no longer a standalone entity; 0.344 OMC shares per IPG share exchanged; John Wren Chairman/CEO of combined entity under OMC ticker. Data-model decision (archive vs. merge with Omnicom) requires founder signoff. No score change proposal generated per scanner guidance.

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: TIAA (rank 1, published 97.5, research 58.6, delta -38.9) and Masimo (rank 146, published 81.4, research 48.4, delta -33.0) confirm scanner Night-5 F500 Gen-2 pattern. TIAA's -38.9 is the largest composite delta produced by any Gen-2 audit to date. Cluster 4x7+3.5x1=81.4 (ranks 10-17) verified as 8-entity artifact via Masimo. Fannie Mae (rank 32, delta -30.9) confirms 3.5x8=62.5 cluster at ranks 36-45.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Systematic F500 Gen-2 re-scoring required. Start with remaining 7 entities in 4x7+3.5x1 cluster (American Express, Becton Dickinson, Cummins, Danaher, Eli Lilly, General Mills, US Bancorp) — Masimo evidence pattern suggests similar profile is not defensible across the cluster.

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.pattern: Cross-index Gen-2 cluster spread to ai-labs
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: DeepMind/Google ai-labs rank 3 published 81.4 with profile AWR/EMP/ACT/BND/ACC/SYS/INT=4, EQU=3.5 — identical profile to F500 Masimo cluster. This is the first confirmed instance of the Gen-2 4x7+3.5x1 pattern crossing from F500 to ai-labs. Cross-index systematic review warranted.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Audit ai-labs index for other 4x7+3.5x1 and similar uniform-profile patterns

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: Germany (rank 6, 95.9) and Netherlands (rank 8, 95.9) share profile 4.5x7+4x1 — same near-uniform pattern. Comparable to Norway (rank-1 country, corrected 2026-04-22 from 100 → 84.7). Top-of-countries-index perfect-ceiling artifact confirmed at multiple ranks.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Set empirical ceiling around 90 for countries index; audit ranks 1-10 for uniform-profile patterns.

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: Interpublic Group no longer independent post Omnicom acquisition (Nov 26 2025). F500 index still carries IPG at rank 89 with standalone composite 53.0. Data-model decision required from founder. Scanner explicitly directed: no score-change proposal; flag for digest surface.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Founder decides: archive IPG entry vs. merge with Omnicom entry (if Omnicom is in F500)

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: Brockman 2017 diary entry 'it was a lie' re: OpenAI nonprofit commitment is primary-source co-founder contemporaneous written evidence cited by federal judge in summary-judgment denial. This is Tier-5 evidence hierarchy — rare in ai-labs index. Drives OpenAI INT 25.0 → 17.5 (I1/I2/I4 anchor 1 all now have founder-documented evidence).
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Trial discovery through April 27-May 25 likely to produce additional Tier-5 evidence; reassess OpenAI multiple times during trial window.

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: Palantir's 22-point corporate manifesto published April 20-21 is rare: explicit corporate-authored statement of values that diverge from compassion-benchmark framework. Cultural-hierarchy language, AI-weapons-normalization, compulsory-service advocacy. Scored as self-declared I1-I4 anchor 1 evidence — saves audit work, as values-divergence is not concealed.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Track whether other entities adopt explicit ideological statements post-Palantir example

urgent_digest_items: TODAY April 23: Illinois SB 3261 committee vote (Anthropic-supported) and SB 3444 deadline (OpenAI-backed liability shield). Anthropic held at 61.6 band-boundary (+1.6pts above Established/Functional floor); OpenAI dropped 28.8 → 27.5 on Brockman diary evidence.
TODAY April 23: Goldman-Wyden-Velazquez congressional letter response deadline for Palantir re: ICE/DHS. Palantir dropped 12.8 → 10.3 on 22-point manifesto.
April 25: Trump DEI EO federal-contractor clause effective; Fannie Mae Westfall Act immunity precedent operationalizes this ahead of schedule.
April 27: Musk v. OpenAI trial jury selection begins; 4-week trial; multiple Tier-5 disclosures expected. Reassess OpenAI weekly through May 25.
April 30: UNMISS mandate expires; Security Council renewal vote pending. South Sudan deferred from today's run pending vote.
May 19: Anthropic v. DoD oral arguments scheduled.

FORENSIC ANCHORS: TIAA rank 1 (F500) proposed -38.9; Masimo rank 146 proposed -33.0. These are the largest single-entity deltas in F500 Gen-2 audit. Founder decision required on how to communicate composite revisions at rank 1.

not_assessed_today.reason: UNMISS mandate expires April 30; renewal vote timing not firmly scheduled per Security Council Report April 2026 monthly forecast. 2026-04-19 baseline remains current (composite 3.8 critical). Re-queue after renewal vote.

confirmed_from_prior_assessments.rationale: No new evidence today. Day-of-vote hold.
No new material in past 24h. $375M NM verdict + keylogger + Senate investigation unchanged.
Floor confirmed. Apple + CSAM + Paris no-show pattern unchanged.
DEI EO effective April 25 already scored.
UN damage report April 20 + Flotilla already scored. Flotilla outcome pending.

assessor_notes.night_5_forensic_anchor_confirmation: TIAA and Masimo as forensic anchors produced -38.9 and -33.0 composite deltas respectively. These are the largest composite movements in any F500 entity assessed. The rank-1 TIAA correction is a methodology-critical disclosure event for the F500 index; the Masimo correction invalidates the 4x7+3.5x1=81.4 cluster profile shared by 8 entities. Recommend formal F500 Gen-2 re-scoring sprint as next-cycle priority.
assessor_notes.cross_index_gen2_spread: DeepMind/Google published composite 81.4 with 4x7+3.5x1 profile identical to F500 Masimo cluster. First confirmed instance of Gen-2 pattern crossing indexes. Suggests batched scoring methodology may have applied to multiple indexes.
assessor_notes.countries_index_ceiling_artifact: Germany and Netherlands 95.9 profiles match top-of-countries pattern. With Norway already corrected 2026-04-22, five country entries across ranks 1-10 now have evidence-based deltas of -15 to -23. Recommend systematic ranks 1-10 countries re-scoring.
assessor_notes.anthropic_day_of_vote_discipline: Held evidence-based score at 61.6 despite vote outcome uncertainty. Post-vote reassessment next cycle regardless of outcome. Band boundary 1.6pts below — narrow margin.
assessor_notes.openai_brockman_tier5_evidence: Brockman 2017 diary cited by Judge Gonzalez Rogers in Jan 15 2026 summary judgment denial is primary-source co-founder contemporaneous evidence — Tier-5 hierarchy. Drives INT below band floor at 17.5 (Critical). I1/I2/I4 all at anchor 1 with founder-documented evidence.
assessor_notes.palantir_self_declared_divergence: 22-point manifesto operates as rare evidence type: explicit corporate-ideological statement of values divergence. No audit required — stated publicly by CEO + corporate affairs head. Drops composite to 10.3 (critical floor-adjacent).
assessor_notes.interpublic_entity_existence: No score proposal generated per scanner directive. Flag for founder data-model decision: archive or merge.
